case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. EVA ROYALE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2020 CONTINUED TO JUN-09-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROYALE, EVA $1,897.98 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,156.93, SEE SCANNED DOC
